references.text: Yuan, YM, Y Song, K Geuten, E Rahelivololona, S Wohlhauser, E Fischer, E Smets & P Küpfer. 2004. Phylogeny and biogeography of Balsaminaceae inferred from ITS sequences. Taxon 53: 391-404.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 31 July 2022

species.citation: Miq. , Fl. Ned. Ind., Eerste Bijv. (1861) 534.
species.distribution: Borneo, Java, Malay Peninsula, Philippines, Sumatra. PALAWAN.
species.notes: Known from the Philippines from Argent & Romero PPI 9610 (L) from Mt Mantalingahan.
